name: DrawingCreator
summary: The DrawingCreator class is for handling the creation of drawings using the built-in logic of Tekla Structures.

methods.name: CreateDrawings(AutoDrawingRule, Identifier)
methods.signature: public static bool CreateDrawings(AutoDrawingRule Rule, Identifier ModelObjectIdentifier)
methods.summary: Creates drawings using the AutoDrawing tool of Tekla Structures.

params.name: Rule
params.doc: The AutoDrawing rule to be used.

params.name: ModelObjectIdentifier
params.doc: The model object identifier to be used. Part identifier to create single part drawing or assembly identifier to create assembly drawing.

methods.name: CreateDrawings(AutoDrawingRule, List<Identifier>, AutoDrawingsStatusEnum.)
methods.signature: public static bool CreateDrawings(AutoDrawingRule Rule, List<Identifier> aModelObjectIdentifier, out AutoDrawingsStatusEnum OperationStatus)
methods.summary: Creates drawings using the AutoDrawing tool of Tekla Structures.

params.name: Rule
params.doc: The AutoDrawing rule to be used.

params.name: aModelObjectIdentifier
params.doc: The model object identifier list to be used. Part identifiers to create single part drawings or assembly identifiers to create assembly drawings.

params.name: OperationStatus
params.doc: The operation status to be used.

methods.name: CreateDrawings(AutoDrawingRule, Identifier, AutoDrawingsStatusEnum.)
methods.signature: public static bool CreateDrawings(AutoDrawingRule Rule, Identifier ModelObjectIdentifier, out AutoDrawingsStatusEnum OperationStatus)
methods.summary: Creates drawings using the AutoDrawing tool of Tekla Structures.

params.name: Rule
params.doc: The AutoDrawing rule to be used.

params.name: ModelObjectIdentifier
params.doc: The model object identifier to be used. Part identifier to create single part drawing or assembly identifier to create assembly drawing.

params.name: OperationStatus
params.doc: The operation status to be used.
